title: Infosys Foundation USA Awards $250,000 Grant to NACCE Digital Workforce Innovation Program
detailed_summary: Infosys Foundation USA awarded a $250,000 grant to NACCE for the Digital Workforce Innovation Program, in collaboration with MakerUSA. Six higher education institutions will receive support over 18 months to advance digital workforce readiness programs. The CSR initiative aims to reach over 3,000 students throughout two years.

key_facts.fact: Infosys Foundation USA awarded a $250,000 grant to NACCE to advance the Digital Workforce Innovation Program.
key_facts.section_heading: Infosys Foundation USA Awards $250,000 Grant to NACCE to Advance Digital Workforce Innovation Program

key_facts.fact: The program selected six higher education institutions, including community colleges, four-year universities, and HBCUs.

key_facts.fact: The program aims to reach over 3,000 students throughout two years.
